findings.detail: pytest exit 0 (1 passed); mypy exit 0; npm typecheck exit 0 + git clean; /health 200 {"status":"ok"}; two create_app w/ distinct GREENLANE_DB use per-app engines and ROUTED get_db requests write/read only their own DB (isolation exercised through the app, not just object identity); run.py serves /health 200 on 8000; tree clean.

summary: All acceptance criteria reproduce on attempt 2; per-app get_db isolation confirmed via routed requests; tree pristine.
